nasb.text: She said, “Drink, my lord”; and she quickly lowered her jar to her hand, and gave him a drink.

esv.text: She said, “Drink, my lord.” And she quickly let down her jar upon her hand and gave him a drink.

cnv.text: 那少女回答：“我主請喝。”就急忙把水瓶拿下來，托在手上給他喝。

ccb.text: 她回答说：“我主，请喝！”说完，立刻放下水罐，托在手上让他喝。

csbs.text: 她说：“我主，请喝吧。”然后急忙拿下罐子，托在自己手上给他喝。
